sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Authentication Core
key_deliverables: EKS Cluster,RDS Postgres,Login UI,JWT Auth Backend
demo_objectives: Show working EKS cluster; Demonstrate Login/MFA flow; Show Database connectivity
success_criteria: Infrastructure deployed via Terraform; Users can log in; Frontend builds successfully
mitigation_strategies: Use validated Terraform modules; Parallel frontend/backend development

sprint_goal: AI SOW Processing & Vector Matching Pipeline
demo_objectives: Upload SOW -> See Extracted Data; Verify PII Redaction; Show Vector Indexing
success_criteria: SOW processed < 30s; PII successfully redacted; Vectors stored in RDS
risk_factors: AI hallucinations; PII leakage; Vector search performance
mitigation_strategies: Implement Zod schema validation; Test with dummy PII; Index optimization

demo_objectives: End-to-end flow: Login -> Upload -> Match -> Pay -> Payout
success_criteria: Payout Saga handles failures; Reconciliation works; Critical bugs = 0
risk_factors: Distributed transaction failures; Stripe webhook reliability
mitigation_strategies: Saga pattern with compensation; DLQ for webhooks
